key_points: Science helps us understand the natural world around us
Scientific knowledge keeps improving with new discoveries and inventions
Scientists observe, ask questions and perform experiments to learn new things
Science plays an important role in improving our daily lives
Technology is the practical application of scientific knowledge
examples: The invention of electricity changed how people live and work
Mobile phones and computers are examples of technology based on science
Vaccines developed by scientists help prevent diseases
Satellites help in communication and weather forecasting
formulas: Science → Study of the natural world through observation and experiments
Technology → Application of scientific knowledge to solve practical problems
exam_tips: Understand the relationship between science and technology
Remember that scientific knowledge changes with new discoveries
Learn examples of how science improves everyday life
Focus on understanding concepts rather than memorizing definitions
